title: Application
content:
(1)	
This Part applies to an award of a tribunal that is made on or 
after the commencement date.
	
(2)	
In this section, *commencement date (生效日期) means the 
date on which the Employment (Amendment) Ordinance 
2010 (9 of 2010) comes into operation.
Editorial Note:
* Commencement date: 29 October 2010.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
